news.paragraph: MongoDB is seeing positive attention after Citi raised its target price and initiated a positive catalyst watch on the stock. Although some analysts have noted pressure from a lack of near-term estimate upside, others believe the company's modest upside is enough to support its current price. Traders should monitor for the upcoming catalysts being watched by major institutions.
headlines: MongoDB's Modest Upside Good Enough to Support Stock, Oppenheimer Says
MongoDB rises as Citi opens positive catalyst watch on stock, lifts target price
